_comment: Per-model metadata for the /dinosaur-3d cluster photoreal-asset layer. Hand-authored; make-dinosaur-3d-manifest.mjs hashes each .glb and emits manifest.json. Every entry MUST be freely redistributable (CC0 / CC-BY / public-domain), verified per-file (see licenses/CREDITS.txt). 'targetLenUnits' is the scene-unit length the viewer scales the model's longest axis to (12 matches the size-vs-human reference in the page). 'kind' = fleshed | skeleton (drives the honesty disclosure).

tyrannosaurus-rex.credit: T. rex model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)

velociraptor.credit: Velociraptor model by Quaternius (CC0, via Poly Pizza)
